source: Curated from the audit discussion of ddx-0793ac75, showing a weak feature bead and concrete retrofit direction.

input_summary.title: federation: federated GraphQL resolvers + routing-metadata fields
description_traits: does not name schema or resolver files
does not define routing metadata shape
acceptance_traits: says tested but names no Test* symbol

rationale.reason: title is specific but combines multiple implementation surfaces
description lacks problem, file:line root cause or current state, proposed file scope, and non-scope
AC names no Test* symbols or go test -run filters
new resolver path has no explicit production wiring assertion
go test and lefthook gates are missing
labels include phase, story cross-reference, area, and kind
parent/deps are not explicit in the provided input
agent cannot pick schema, resolver files, metadata fields, or tests from the bead alone

suggested_fixes.fix: Add CURRENT STATE citing cli/internal/server/graphql/schema.graphql and resolver package locations, plus PROPOSED FIX and NON-SCOPE.
Add cd cli && go test ./internal/server/... and lefthook run pre-commit AC lines.
